title: D&D Beyond Mechanical Parity Remediation Report
summary: Full-stack parity audit and remediation implementing: (1) Level-gating module for all job/path/feature/power/ASI selections, (2) Domain event contract bus with typed payloads for 8 core gameplay events, (3) Gemini Protocol runtime resolver with modifier pipeline, (4) Regent runtime resolver with multi-regent merge and precedence, (5) Supabase migration adding gemini_state column + validate_level_gate RPC, (6) 76 unit tests covering all new modules, (7) Event emission wired into character level-up and rest systems.
assumptions: Stack: React 19 + Tailwind 4 + TypeScript 5.9 + Supabase + Vite 7 + Vitest 4 + Playwright 1.58
No separate race/archetype/multiclass systems — all former racial/archetype effects are embedded in job (class) definitions
Gemini Protocol and Regents are first-class runtime systems, not cosmetic
Every domain event payload includes classId, geminiState, regents, and activeEffects
Level gating is enforced at UI, hook, and RPC/SQL layers
Existing character data (job, path, monarch_overlays, sovereign_id) is backfill-compatible

features: Runtime state builder from saved sovereign data
Corruption risk calculation from fusion stability
Runtime state builder from DB data

changes: validate_level_gate() RPC function for path/feature/power/ASI validation
Backfill gemini_state from existing sovereign_id data

wired_flows.emits_at: after all short rest operations complete
after all long rest operations complete (including partial failure path)

validate_level_gate.signature: validate_level_gate(p_character_id UUID, p_selection_type TEXT, p_selection_id UUID, p_power_level INTEGER)

code_fixes.description: Pure-logic level gating module: path unlock, feature, power/spell, ASI/feat windows, composite summary
Typed domain event bus with 8 event types, core payload builder, singleton bus with wildcard support
Gemini Protocol runtime resolver: modifier pipeline, state builder, event ref conversions
Regent runtime resolver: level-filtered modifiers, multi-regent merge, unlock gating
Migration: gemini_state + active_sovereign_id columns, validate_level_gate RPC, backfill
Added level gating + domain event imports; emit character:levelup event after successful level-up
Added domain event imports; emit rest:short and rest:long events after rest completion

categories: DomainEventBus typed delivery, wildcard, off, error isolation
Payload contract assertions for all 8 event types
Runtime state builder with level filtering

e2e_scenarios.name: Character creation with level-1 path gating
e2e_scenarios.description: Create character → verify only level-1-eligible paths are shown → verify path features are granted only if path_level = 1

e2e_scenarios.name: Level-up with path unlock prompt
e2e_scenarios.description: Level up to path unlock level → verify path selection prompt appears → verify path features are granted

e2e_scenarios.name: Gemini activation flow
e2e_scenarios.description: Unlock 2 regents → activate Gemini → verify gemini_state persists → verify modifier pipeline

e2e_scenarios.name: Rest system event emission
e2e_scenarios.description: Perform short/long rest → verify domain events emitted with correct payloads

acceptance_criteria: All 76 unit tests pass (levelGating, domainEvents, geminiResolver, regentResolver)
No separate race/archetype/multiclass selection UI exists in active gameplay flows
Path selection is gated by path_level — hidden/disabled before unlock level
Power/spell selection is gated by max power level for job at character level
ASI/Feat selection is gated by job-specific ASI levels
Feature unlocks only appear at their designated level
Domain events carry classId, geminiState, regents in every payload
validate_level_gate RPC rejects out-of-level selections at DB layer
Gemini resolver provides deterministic modifier pipeline (set → multiply → add)
Regent resolver supports multi-regent merge with primary precedence
Rest system emits rest:short and rest:long domain events
Level-up flow emits character:levelup domain event

phase_a.name: Schema + Migrations
phase_a.description: Added gemini_state, active_sovereign_id columns; validate_level_gate RPC; backfill script

phase_b.name: Character Lifecycle
phase_b.description: Wired level-up flow with domain event emission and level gating imports

phase_c.name: Gemini Protocol Runtime
phase_c.description: Created geminiResolver.ts with modifier pipeline, state builder, event conversions

phase_d.name: Regent Runtime
phase_d.description: Created regentResolver.ts with level-filtered modifiers, multi-regent merge, gating

phase_e.name: Domain Events
phase_e.description: Created domainEvents.ts with typed bus, 8 event types, core payload builder

phase_f.name: Core Mechanic Hardening
phase_f.description: Wired event emission into restSystem.ts; level gating module covers all gated surfaces

phase_g.name: Tests
phase_g.description: 76 unit tests across 4 test files covering level gating, domain events, gemini resolver, regent resolver

ci_snippet.description: GitHub Actions CI workflow with fail-fast stages
ci_snippet.yaml:
name: Parity CI
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
  typecheck:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npx tsc --noEmit
  unit-tests:
    needs: typecheck
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npx vitest run --reporter=verbose
  e2e-tests:
    needs: unit-tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
      - run: npx playwright test --reporter=html
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: always()
        with:
          name: playwright-report
          path: playwright-report/
